author: y4rr
content: Bumped [workspace.package] 0.4.1 -> 0.4.2 plus all 19 internal workspace.dependencies entries. Cargo.lock regenerated via cargo update --workspace. cargo check --workspace --all-targets passed clean (exit 0). Committed as 497c32ee on main. Pre-existing unrelated modifications to .gitignore, ferrotorch-gpu/src/bf16.rs, and ferrotorch-llama/{examples/llama3_8b.rs,src/gpu.rs} left untouched and unstaged.
